description: Account of a Parnas ca. 1200. Upper part of a leaf in very deteriorated condition. It contains notes made by a parnas, recording the collection of sums for repairs in some houses of the qodesh. The verso contains several items of eexpenditures for an unnamed Nasi. (Information from Gil, Documents, pp. 392 #105)
description_he: חשבון פרנס, כ-1200. רשומות גבייה לתיקוני בתי הקדש. על הגב: הוצאות לנשיא שאינו מזוהה.
